dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Alien crashes into vast ocean

dialogueItems.name: Alien
dialogueItems.text: Where in the morp am I?

dialogueItems.name: Alien
dialogueItems.text: Merzp to command, come in command, over.

dialogueItems.name: Comms Device
Story
dialogueItems.text: Static is her only reply

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Merzp to command, come in command, over.

dialogueItems.name: Comms Device
Story
dialogueItems.text: Static continues to keep her company

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Hello is anyone there? My name is Merzp and I have crashed on my expedition of the Verpa Quadrant and I have crashed on an unknown planet.

dialogueItems.name: Comms Device
Story
dialogueItems.text: The air is filled the cold reply of static once more

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Great, just great!

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Merzp checks her comms device and sees it is missing some components

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: What in the fleep florp could have happened to this thing?

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Merzp assesses her surroundings and sees a piece of her comms device out in the ocean

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: How meep morp wonderful, I have to go through the water just to get that piece!

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: And did I just see sorpen food? Might be worth taking a look at, although I dont really need it.

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Merzp carefully scans the water with her suits built in scanner and discovers this water is no water at all as it has a PH level of 1

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Good thing my ship is acid proof. I just need to break pieces off of it as I can see more pieces of my device scattered all around here. Let me just…

dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Merzp breaks pieces of the inside of her ship to throw into the ocean for her to jump to her other pieces

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: I know I won’t be needing this ship anymore so it’s doing one last thing for me.
